meta.description: 22 bio-inspired formulas for Muninn memory engine

formulas.name: Coupled oscillator arm control
formulas.equation: tau_i = J_i * theta_ddot_i + B_i * theta_dot_i + K_i * theta_i + sum_j C_ij * (theta_i - theta_j)
formulas.python: tau[i] = J[i]*theta_ddot[i] + B[i]*theta_dot[i] + K[i]*theta[i] + sum(C[i,j]*(theta[i]-theta[j]) for j in neighbors(i))

paper.title: Dynamic model of the octopus arm. I. Biomechanics of the octopus reaching movement
paper.authors: Yekutieli, Sagiv-Zohar, Aharonov, Engel, Hochner, Flash

formulas.scale: angular error (degrees), trajectory correlation R^2 > 0.9
formulas.failures: 2D model only, fails for unconstrained 3D movements (Hanassy et al. 2015 J Exp Biol)
formulas.muninn_use: Each memory branch = arm segment. Local propagation via C_ij coupling through mycelium. No central coordinator needed.

formulas.name: Consensus protocol on Laplacian
formulas.equation: dx_i/dt = sum_j a_ij * (x_j - x_i)  =>  dx/dt = -L * x
formulas.python: dx = -L @ x  # converges to mean if graph connected, rate = 1/lambda_2(L)

paper.title: Consensus problems in networks of agents with switching topology and communication delays

formulas.scale: convergence time = 1/lambda_2(L), steady-state error
formulas.failures: Diverges if graph disconnected; fragile to Byzantine faults (LeBlanc et al. 2013 IEEE TAC)
formulas.muninn_use: Temporal dynamics on L instead of spectral decomposition. Recall stabilization = consensus convergence.

formulas.name: Cortical scaling power law
formulas.equation: N = a * M^alpha
formulas.python: N = a * M**alpha  # primates alpha~1.0, rodents alpha~0.6

paper.title: The human brain in numbers: a linearly scaled-up primate brain

formulas.scale: log-log fit R^2 (typically > 0.99), exponent alpha +/- 95% CI
formulas.failures: Fails for cetaceans (neurons in cerebellum not cortex, Mortensen et al. 2014 Frontiers)
formulas.muninn_use: Monitor graph scaling efficiency. If branches/memory ratio follows alpha~1.0 = primate-efficient. If alpha < 0.8 = rodent-wasteful, prune.

formulas.name: TD-Learning reward prediction error
formulas.equation: delta_t = r_t + gamma * V(s_{t+1}) - V(s_t);  V(s_t) <- V(s_t) + alpha * delta_t
formulas.python: delta = reward + gamma * V[s_next] - V[s]; V[s] += alpha * delta

paper.title: A neural substrate of prediction and reward

formulas.scale: correlation dopamine firing rate vs model delta (R > 0.8), cumulative reward
formulas.failures: Misses dopamine ramp (Howe et al. 2013 Nature); credit assignment problem for delayed rewards
formulas.muninn_use: delta modulates mycelium weights. Successful recall (delta > 0) = reinforce path. Useless recall (delta < 0) = accelerate decay. Adaptive Ebbinghaus where h depends on delta.

formulas.name: Transitive inference value transfer
formulas.equation: V(A) = r(A) + beta * sum_j V(j) * P(A>j);  RT = a - b * log(|rank_i - rank_j|)
formulas.latex: V(A) = r(A) + \beta \sum_j V(j) P(A \succ j) \quad;\quad RT = a - b \log|rank_i - rank_j|
formulas.python: V[A] = r[A] + beta * sum(V[j] * P_win[A,j] for j in items); RT = a - b * np.log(abs(rank[i] - rank[j]))

paper.title: Transitive inference in pigeons is not a simple artifact: Reassessing Couvillon and Bitterman (1992)
paper.journal: Journal of Experimental Psychology: Animal Behavior Processes

also.title: Transitive inference in social dominance in pinyon jays

formulas.scale: % correct on untrained BD pair, symbolic distance effect slope
formulas.failures: Pigeons may use simple association not true reasoning (Vasconcelos 2008 Animal Behaviour)
formulas.muninn_use: Transitive closure on mycelium. If A co-occurs with B, B with C, infer A->C with decaying weight beta^distance. Collins & Loftus does spreading but without ORDERED chains.

formulas.name: Bayesian Theory of Mind (BToM)
formulas.equation: P(goal|actions,state) propto P(actions|goal,state) * P(goal);  P(actions|goal,state) propto exp(-C(actions,goal,state))
formulas.python: P_goal = np.exp(-cost[actions,goal,state]) * prior[goal]; P_goal /= P_goal.sum()

paper.title: Action understanding as inverse planning

formulas.scale: correlation model predictions vs human judgments (R^2 ~ 0.95), log-likelihood
formulas.failures: Computationally intractable for complex scenarios; assumes agent rationality (fails for irrational agents)
formulas.muninn_use: User modeling. Infer user goal from last 3-5 queries as actions. Pre-activate relevant branches. Cost C = edit distance between query pattern and branch content.

formulas.name: Unihemispheric sleep two-process
formulas.equation: dS_L/dt = -S_L/tau_d (sleeping); dS_R/dt = +1/tau_r (awake); switch when S > theta_high or S < theta_low
formulas.python: if S[L] > theta_high: hemisphere[L] = 'sleep'; if S[L] < theta_low: hemisphere[L] = 'wake'  # alternating

paper.title: Behavioral, neurophysiological and evolutionary perspectives on unihemispheric sleep

also.title: A two process model of sleep regulation

formulas.scale: L/R sleep time ratio, switch latency (minutes), EEG delta power asymmetry
formulas.failures: Inter-hemispheric coupling mechanism still poorly understood (Mascetti 2016 Sleep Medicine Reviews)
formulas.muninn_use: Two subsystems alternate: one serves queries (online) while other consolidates (compaction, branch fusion). Never both on same subgraph.

formulas.name: Elastic Weight Consolidation (EWC)
formulas.equation: L(theta) = L_B(theta) + lambda/2 * sum_i F_i * (theta_i - theta_star_A_i)^2
formulas.python: loss = loss_task_B + (lam/2) * sum(F[i] * (theta[i] - theta_star_A[i])**2 for i in params)

paper.title: Overcoming catastrophic forgetting in neural networks
paper.authors: Kirkpatrick, Pascanu, Rabinowitz, Veness, Desjardins, Rusu, Milan, Quan, Ramalho, Grabska-Barwinska, Hassabis, Clopath, Kumaran, Hadsell

formulas.scale: accuracy on task A after learning task B, average multi-task accuracy
formulas.failures: Doesn't scale past ~10 sequential tasks; diagonal Fisher is crude approximation (Huszar 2018 arXiv:1801.01423)
formulas.muninn_use: Ebbinghaus half-life weighted by Fisher importance: h_node = h_base * (1 + F_i). High-F nodes (critical for past good recalls) decay SLOWER.

formulas.name: Quorum sensing Hill switch
formulas.equation: dA/dt = k_s * N * A^n / (K^n + A^n) - k_d * A
formulas.python: dA_dt = k_s * N * A**n / (K**n + A**n) - k_d * A  # bistable switch

paper.title: A mathematical model for quorum sensing in Pseudomonas aeruginosa

formulas.scale: threshold concentration (nM), activation time (min), signal/noise ratio of switch
formulas.failures: Simple model misses inter-species communication (polymicrobial); stochastic noise at low N
formulas.muninn_use: Activate a branch ONLY when enough neighbor nodes are co-activated (quorum). Hill function as gate: f(A) > 0.5 only when A > K. Prevents false positives from single isolated node.

formulas.name: Cross-inhibition winner-take-all
formulas.equation: dN_A/dt = r_A*(1-N_A/K)*N_A - beta*N_B*N_A;  dN_B/dt = r_B*(1-N_B/K)*N_B - beta*N_A*N_B
formulas.latex: \frac{dN_A}{dt} = r_A(1-\frac{N_A}{K})N_A - \beta N_B N_A \quad;\quad \frac{dN_B}{dt} = r_B(1-\frac{N_B}{K})N_B - \beta N_A N_B
formulas.python: dNA = r_A*(1-NA/K)*NA - beta*NB*NA; dNB = r_B*(1-NB/K)*NB - beta*NA*NB

paper.title: Stop signals provide cross inhibition in collective decision-making by honeybee swarms
paper.authors: Seeley, Visscher, Schlegel, Hogan, Franks, Marshall

formulas.scale: decision time (hours), % convergence to best site, split-brain ratio
formulas.failures: Deadlock with > 5 similar-quality options (Pais et al. 2013 Journal of the Royal Society Interface)
formulas.muninn_use: When two branches compete for same query (ambiguity), they cross-inhibit. Better branch (higher r) wins. beta controls speed vs caution. Direct upgrade of existing -beta*w^2.

formulas.name: Emotional tagging modulator
formulas.equation: w_new = w_old + eta * delta * E(a);  E(a) = 1 + kappa * a^n / (a^n + theta_E^n)
formulas.python: E_a = 1 + kappa * a**n / (a**n + theta_E**n); w_new = w_old + eta * delta * E_a

paper.title: Emotional tagging of memory formation--in the search for neural mechanisms

formulas.scale: retention at 24h/48h (% recall), emotional vs neutral delta (typically +15-25%)
formulas.failures: Excessive arousal DEGRADES memory (inverted-U, Yerkes-Dodson); tagging fails for implicit memory (Bergado et al. 2011)
formulas.muninn_use: Arousal score a per interaction (prompt length, urgency markers, !!! in text). E(a) multiplies initial mycelium weight. High arousal = stronger initial encoding.

formulas.name: Valence-modulated Ebbinghaus decay
formulas.equation: p(t) = 2^(-t / h(v,a));  h(v,a) = h_base * (1 + alpha_v * |v| + alpha_a * a)
formulas.python: h = h_base * (1 + alpha_v * abs(valence) + alpha_a * arousal); p = 2**(-t / h)

paper.title: Enhanced emotional memory: Cognitive and neural mechanisms

also.title: Mechanisms of emotional arousal and lasting declarative memory

formulas.scale: d' (signal detection), hazard ratio of memory survival curves
formulas.failures: Positive and negative valence differ: negative retained better short-term, positive long-term (fading affect bias, Walker & Skowronski 2009 Memory & Cognition)
formulas.muninn_use: Direct upgrade: h becomes dynamic, modulated by valence and arousal. Errors (negative) fade faster than successes (positive) long-term.

formulas.name: Response threshold model (stigmergy)
formulas.equation: P(task_j | stimulus s_j) = s_j^n / (s_j^n + theta_j^n)
formulas.python: P_task = s**n / (s**n + theta**n)  # each agent has different theta -> emergent specialization

paper.title: Response threshold reinforcement and division of labour in insect societies
paper.journal: Proceedings of the Royal Society B

formulas.scale: colony efficiency (tasks/time), specialization entropy, robustness to agent loss
formulas.failures: Over-predicts rigid specialization; real ants switch more (lazy ants = reserve, Charbonneau et al. 2013 Behavioral Ecology)
formulas.muninn_use: Each branch has response threshold theta. Query triggers branch only if relevance > theta. Different branches specialize without central allocation.

formulas.name: ACO pheromone update + probability
formulas.equation: tau_ij(t+1) = (1-rho)*tau_ij(t) + sum_k Delta_tau_ij^k;  p_ij = tau_ij^alpha * eta_ij^beta / sum_l (tau_il^alpha * eta_il^beta)
formulas.python: tau[i,j] = (1-rho)*tau[i,j] + sum(Q/L[k] for k if used(i,j,k)); p[i,j] = tau[i,j]**a * eta[i,j]**b / sum(tau[i,l]**a * eta[i,l]**b for l in neighbors(i))

paper.title: Ant system: optimization by a colony of cooperating agents
paper.journal: IEEE Transactions on Systems, Man, and Cybernetics, Part B

formulas.scale: gap% vs known optimum (TSP), convergence time, scalability (cities)
formulas.failures: Premature convergence (stagnation) on large problems; sensitive to rho/alpha/beta tuning (Stutzle & Hoos 2000 Future Generation Computer Systems)
formulas.muninn_use: Recall = ant seeking path. Evaporation (1-rho) = Ebbinghaus decay. Deposit = reinforcement on use. KEY: p_ij combines tau (history) AND eta (local relevance) -- Muninn should do the same.

formulas.name: Echolocation matched filter + Doppler
formulas.equation: R = c*dt/2;  v = c*df/(2*f0);  C(tau) = integral s(t)*r(t+tau) dt
formulas.latex: R = \frac{c \Delta t}{2} \quad;\quad v = \frac{c \Delta f}{2 f_0} \quad;\quad C(\tau) = \int s(t) r(t+\tau) dt
formulas.python: R = c*dt/2; v = c*df/(2*f0); C = np.correlate(signal_emitted, echo_received, mode='full')

paper.title: A view of the world through the bat's ear: the formation of acoustic images in echolocation

also.title: Probing the natural scene by echolocation in bats

formulas.scale: spatial resolution (mm), prey capture rate (%), angular precision (degrees)
formulas.failures: Matched filter can't separate two targets < 2mm apart (resolution limit); cocktail party problem in groups
formulas.muninn_use: Active probing: Muninn emits TF-IDF ping of current context, cross-correlates with all branches, measures which resonate. Pulse rate increases when context changes fast.

formulas.name: Active sensing info-theoretic
formulas.equation: a* = argmax_a I(X;Y|a) = argmax_a [H(X) - E_Y[H(X|Y,a)]]
formulas.python: a_star = max(actions, key=lambda a: H_X - expected_H_X_given_Y(a))  # max info gain

paper.title: Theoretical perspectives on active sensing

formulas.scale: bits of information gained per action, queries before certainty, cumulative regret
formulas.failures: Exact computation intractable for large state spaces; greedy 1-step lookahead is suboptimal
formulas.muninn_use: When uncertain, choose the clarification question that maximizes entropy reduction. Not random question -- the BEST question.

formulas.name: Bioelectric gap junction network (Levin)
formulas.equation: dV_i/dt = -g_leak*(V_i - E_leak) + sum_j g_gap*(V_j - V_i) + I_ion
formulas.python: dV[i] = -g_leak*(V[i]-E_leak) + sum(g_gap*(V[j]-V[i]) for j in neighbors(i)) + I_ion[i]

paper.title: An automated training paradigm reveals long-term memory in planarians and its persistence through head regeneration

also.title: Molecular bioelectricity in developmental biology: new tools and recent discoveries

formulas.scale: % retention post-decapitation (planarians ~80%), number of regenerations before loss
formulas.failures: Controversial -- McConnell 1962 never fully replicated by some labs; exact storage mechanism debated
formulas.muninn_use: If a node is destroyed, neighbors reconstruct its value by diffusion. Same dx/dt = -L*x structure but for REGENERATION not consensus.

formulas.name: Reed-Solomon error correction
formulas.equation: encode: p(x) = sum_{i=0}^{k-1} m_i * x^i evaluated at n points;  corrects t = (n-k)/2 symbol errors;  d_min >= n-k+1
formulas.latex: p(x) = \sum_{i=0}^{k-1} m_i x^i \quad;\quad t = \lfloor\frac{n-k}{2}\rfloor \quad;\quad d_{min} \geq n-k+1
formulas.python: # k symbols encoded as n symbols, corrects (n-k)//2 errors. n/k = redundancy ratio

paper.title: Polynomial codes over certain finite fields
paper.journal: Journal of the Society for Industrial and Applied Mathematics

formulas.scale: correction rate (errors fixed / total), overhead ratio n/k, effective throughput
formulas.failures: Only corrects symbol errors not timing/burst errors (needs interleaving); decoding complexity O(n^2)
formulas.muninn_use: Store critical branches with redundancy n/k > 1. If nodes are corrupted/lost, remaining nodes reconstruct. Example: k=10 concepts encoded in n=15 nodes, survives loss of 2.

formulas.name: VADER sentiment scoring
formulas.equation: compound = sum(s_i * w_i) / sqrt((sum(s_i * w_i))^2 + alpha)
formulas.python: raw = sum(s[i]*w[i] for i in words); compound = raw / math.sqrt(raw**2 + 15)  # alpha=15

paper.title: VADER: A parsimonious rule-based model for sentiment analysis of social media text

formulas.scale: F1-score vs human annotations (~0.96 on tweets), correlation with human ratings
formulas.failures: Bad on sarcasm/irony; no context beyond sentence; English-biased
formulas.muninn_use: Tag each interaction with compound score in [-1,+1]. Ultra-fast rule-based, no LLM needed. Feed into V6 emotional tagging.

formulas.name: Russell circumplex affect mapping
formulas.equation: E = (v, a) where v=valence in [-1,+1], a=arousal in [-1,+1];  theta = atan2(a, v);  r = sqrt(v^2 + a^2)
formulas.python: theta = math.atan2(arousal, valence); r = math.sqrt(valence**2 + arousal**2)

paper.title: A circumplex model of affect
paper.journal: Journal of Personality and Social Psychology

formulas.scale: circular correlation with self-report data; stress test: do discrete emotions map to correct angle?
formulas.failures: Reductive -- nostalgia, pride, guilt don't map cleanly to 2D; culturally biased (Gendron et al. 2014 Psychological Science)
formulas.muninn_use: Each session = point (v,a). Cluster sessions by emotional state. Route queries based on affect: high arousal sessions get emotional tagging + slower decay.

formulas.name: Song revolution SI-model
formulas.equation: dN_new/dt = beta * N_new * (N_total - N_new) / N_total - mu * N_new
formulas.python: dN_new = beta * N_new * (N_total - N_new) / N_total - mu * N_new

paper.title: Dynamic horizontal cultural transmission of humpback whale song at the ocean basin scale
paper.authors: Garland, Goldizen, Rekdahl, Constantine, Garrigue, Hauser, Poole, Robbins, Noad

formulas.scale: % population with new song per month, propagation speed (km/year), song type diversity (Shannon H)
formulas.failures: Doesn't predict WHY some songs spread and others don't; misses partial retention (hybrids)
formulas.muninn_use: When a better memory pattern emerges, it replaces old ones by epidemic spread through mycelium. Speed controlled by beta. Same dn/dt structure as BARE Wave but for CULTURAL replacement.

formulas.name: Boyd-Richerson cultural transmission (3 biases)
formulas.equation: conformist: dp = beta*p*(1-p)*(2p-1);  prestige: p' = sum_i w_i*p_i;  guided variation: p' = p + mu*(p_opt - p)
formulas.latex: \Delta p = \beta p(1-p)(2p-1) \quad;\quad p' = \sum_i w_i p_i \quad;\quad p' = p + \mu(p_{opt} - p)
formulas.python: dp_conform = beta*p*(1-p)*(2*p-1); p_prestige = sum(w[i]*p[i] for i in models); dp_guided = mu*(p_opt - p)

paper.title: Culture and the Evolutionary Process

formulas.scale: cultural convergence speed (generations), cultural diversity (F_ST analogs), tradition stability
formulas.failures: Conformist bias assumes homogeneous mixing (false in structured networks); prestige bias hard to measure quantitatively
formulas.muninn_use: Three signals for node weight: (1) conformist = how many neighbors use it, (2) prestige = history of successful recalls, (3) guided = correction by LLM. Powerful self-organization without supervisor.
